title: Vaabesh
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type=Jedi |image=[[File:Vaabesh.jpg]] |name=Vaabesh |homeworld=[[Gand (planet)/Legends|Gand]]''[[Star Wars: Republic: The Battle of Jabiim]]'' |birth= |death=[[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]],''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]''{{TCW|Heroes on Both Sides}} [[Jabiim/Legends|Jabiim]] |species=[[Gand/Legends|Gand]] ([[Breather Gand|breather]]) |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes=[[Color/Legends|Black]] |skin=Brown |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=*[[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] *[[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|I'm sorry, Vaabesh. But I need your lightsaber.''"
"''Of course. Take it. Use it better than I did…|[[Aubrie Wyn]] and Vaabesh|}} '''Vaabesh''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Breather Gand|breather]] [[Gand/Legends|Gand]] [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] serving the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] and the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] as a [[Jedi Commander/Legends|Commander]] in the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. ==Biography== A [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] [[Gand/Legends|Gand]], Vaabesh was [[Jedi training/Legends|educated]] in the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] by the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] during the decade marked by the [[Separatist Crisis/Legends|Separatist Crisis]]. Selected as a [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]], Vaabesh constructed a green-bladed [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] which he wielded in battle. When the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] erupted between the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]], Vaabesh took up the rank of [[Jedi Commander/Legends|Commander]] within the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]]. Along with his master, Vaabesh was assigned to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Jabiim/Legends|Jabiim]] where they were to join other Jedi in a [[Battle of Jabiim|months-long battle]] with the Confederacy-backed [[Jabiimi Nationalists]]. During the fighting, Vaabesh's master was slain and command was turned over to [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] who ordered that their small force remain behind the main battle line until the main Republic force could overrun the main weapons emplacement of the [[Jabiimi Military]]. Along with other masterless apprentices, Vaabesh became known as a member of the so-called [[Padawan Pack]]. [[Jedi General/Legends|General]] Kenobi ordered Vaabesh to ambush the retreating soldiers as they fled along the flanks of the main column of the Republic army. Separated from the rest of his group after the battle, Vaabesh eventually regrouped with the other Padawans as they made for the main outpost of the Grand Army. [[File:VaabeshDeath.jpg|thumb|left|250px|Vaabesh dies on the battlefield.]] As the Padawan Pack made a break for the main Republic outpost they came into open conflict with Jabiimi Nationalist leader [[Alto Stratus]]. Fighting alongside [[Aubrie Wyn]] for four days on the battlefield, Vaabesh's containment suit was breached during the fighting and he would slowly die of oxygen poisoning. As he lay dying, Wyn asked him for his lightsaber to fend off Stratus. While Wyn ultimately was killed, she managed to kill the Jabiimi leader with her and Vaabesh's weapon as she took her last breath. When the fighting finally concluded, Vaabesh's death would be memorialized in the wings of a [[Memory moth/Legends|memory moth]] within a [[Jedi monument (New Holstice)|monument]] on [[New Holstice/Legends|New Holstice]]. ==Appearances== *[[Republic 56|''Republic'' 56]] {{1st}} *[[Republic 57|''Republic'' 57]] *[[Republic 58|''Republic'' 58]] {{Mo}} ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Mediacat|imagecat=Images of Vaabesh}} {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Vaabesh |es=Vaabesh |pl=Vaabesh |deGA=1 }} [[Category:Gand]] [[Category:Jedi Commanders]] [[Category:Jedi trainees of the Jedi Order]] [[Category:Males]]
